differential_diagnoses: Type 1 or Type 4 Congenital Pulmonary Airway Malformation (CPAM)
Pulmonary hypoplasia associated with renal anomalies
Persistent pulmonary hypertension of the newborn (PPHN)
next_steps: Contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) of the chest to characterize the lung lesion and its blood supply
Pediatric surgery consultation for possible resection or biopsy
Bronchoscopy to assess for airway obstruction or localized infection
Bronchoalveolar lavage for microbiological culture and cytology
Serial renal ultrasound monitoring to assess for progressive obstructive uropathy
